155:   def get_optimized_image(width, height, opts = nil)
156:     opts ||= {}
157: 
158:     fix_image_extension if (!extension || extension.length == 0)
159: 
160:     opts = opts.merge(raise_on_error: true)
161:     begin
162:       OptimizedImage.create_for(self, width, height, opts)
163:     rescue => ex
164:       Rails.logger.info ex if Rails.env.development?
165:       opts = opts.merge(raise_on_error: false)
166:       if fix_image_extension
167:         OptimizedImage.create_for(self, width, height, opts)
168:       else
169:         nil
170:       end
171:     end
172:   end

174:   def content

184:   def fix_image_extension
185:     return false if extension == "unknown"
186: 
187:     begin
188:       # this is relatively cheap once cached
189:       original_path = Discourse.store.path_for(self)
190:       original_path = Discourse.store.download(self) if original_path.blank?
191: 
192:       image_info =
193:         begin
194:           image = FastImage.new(original_path)
195:           image.type # eager load to rescue errors early
196:           image
197:         rescue StandardError
198:           nil
199:         end
200:       new_extension = image_info&.type&.to_s || "unknown"
201: 
202:       if new_extension != self.extension
203:         self.update_columns(extension: new_extension)
204:         true
205:       end
206:     rescue StandardError
207:       self.update_columns(extension: "unknown")
208:       true
209:     end
210:   end

295:   def fix_dimensions!
296:     return if !FileHelper.is_supported_image?("image.#{extension}")
297: 
298:     begin
299:       path =
300:         if local?
301:           Discourse.store.path_for(self)
302:         else
303:           Discourse.store.download!(self)
304:         end
305: 
306:       if extension == "svg"
307:         w, h =
308:           begin
309:             Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
310:               "identify",
311:               "-ping",
312:               "-format",
313:               "%w %h",
314:               path,
315:               timeout: MAX_IDENTIFY_SECONDS,
316:             ).split(" ")
317:           rescue StandardError
318:             [0, 0]
319:           end
320:       else
321:         w, h = FastImage.new(path, raise_on_failure: true).size
322:       end
323: 
324:       self.width = w || 0
325:       self.height = h || 0
326: 
327:       self.thumbnail_width, self.thumbnail_height = ImageSizer.resize(w, h)
328: 
329:       self.update_columns(
330:         width: width,
331:         height: height,
332:         thumbnail_width: thumbnail_width,
333:         thumbnail_height: thumbnail_height,
334:       )
335:     rescue => e
336:       Discourse.warn_exception(e, message: "Error getting image dimensions")
337:     end
338:     nil
339:   end
340: 
341:   # on demand image size calculation, this allows us to null out image sizes
342:   # and still handle as needed
343:   def get_dimension(key)
344:     if v = self[key]
345:       return v
346:     end
347:     fix_dimensions!
348:     self[key]
349:   end
350:

352:     get_dimension(:width)
353:   end

357:   end

360:     get_dimension(:thumbnail_width)
361:   end
362: 
363:   def thumbnail_height
364:     get_dimension(:thumbnail_height)
365:   end

367:   def dominant_color(calculate_if_missing: false)
368:     val = read_attribute(:dominant_color)
369:     if val.nil? && calculate_if_missing
370:       calculate_dominant_color!
371:       read_attribute(:dominant_color)
372:     else
373:       val
374:     end
375:   end
376: 
377:   def calculate_dominant_color!(local_path = nil)
378:     color = nil
379: 
380:     color = "" if !FileHelper.is_supported_image?("image.#{extension}") || extension == "svg"
381: 
382:     if color.nil?
383:       local_path ||=
384:         if local?
385:           Discourse.store.path_for(self)
386:         else
387:           Discourse.store.download(self)
388:         end
389: 
390:       if local_path.nil?
391:         # Download failed. Could be too large to download, or file could be missing in s3
392:         color = ""
393:       end
394: 
395:       color ||=
396:         begin
397:           data =
398:             Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
399:               "nice",
400:               "-n",
401:               "10",
402:               "convert",
403:               local_path,
404:               "-depth",
405:               "8",
406:               "-resize",
407:               "1x1",
408:               "-define",
409:               "histogram:unique-colors=true",
410:               "-format",
411:               "%c",
412:               "histogram:info:",
413:               timeout: DOMINANT_COLOR_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
414:             )
415: 
416:           # Output format:
417:           # 1: (110.873,116.226,93.8821) #6F745E srgb(43.4798%,45.5789%,36.8165%)
418: 
419:           color = data[/#([0-9A-F]{6})/, 1]
420: 
421:           raise "Calculated dominant color but unable to parse output:\n#{data}" if color.nil?
422: 
423:           color
424:         rescue Discourse::Utils::CommandError
425:           # Timeout or unable to parse image
426:           # This can happen due to bad user input - ignore and save
427:           # an empty string to prevent re-evaluation
428:           ""
429:         end
430:     end
431: 
432:     if persisted?
433:       self.update_column(:dominant_color, color)
434:     else
435:       self.dominant_color = color
436:     end
437:   end

439:   def target_image_quality(local_path, test_quality)
440:     @file_quality ||=
441:       begin
442:         Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
443:           "identify",
444:           "-ping",
445:           "-format",
446:           "%Q",
447:           local_path,
448:           timeout: MAX_IDENTIFY_SECONDS,
449:         ).to_i
450:       rescue StandardError
451:         0
452:       end
453: 
454:     test_quality if @file_quality == 0 || @file_quality > test_quality
455:   end

457:   def self.sha1_from_short_path(path)
458:     self.sha1_from_base62_encoded($2) if path =~ %r{(/uploads/short-url/)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\..*)?}
459:   end

461:   def self.sha1_from_short_url(url)
462:     self.sha1_from_base62_encoded($2) if url =~ %r{(upload://)?([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\..*)?}
463:   end

465:   def self.sha1_from_long_url(url)
466:     $2 if url =~ URL_REGEX || url =~ OptimizedImage::URL_REGEX
467:   end

469:   def self.sha1_from_base62_encoded(encoded_sha1)
470:     return nil if encoded_sha1.length > MAX_BASE62_SHA1_LENGTH
471:     sha1 = Base62.decode(encoded_sha1).to_s(16)
472: 
473:     if sha1.length > SHA1_LENGTH
474:       nil
475:     else
476:       sha1.rjust(SHA1_LENGTH, "0")
477:     end
478:   end

492:   def update_secure_status(source: "unknown", override: nil)
493:     if override.nil?
494:       mark_secure, reason = UploadSecurity.new(self).should_be_secure_with_reason
495:     else
496:       mark_secure = override
497:       reason = "manually overridden"
498:     end
499: 
500:     secure_status_did_change = self.secure? != mark_secure
501:     self.update(secure_params(mark_secure, reason, source))
502: 
503:     if secure_status_did_change && Discourse.store.external?
504:       Discourse.store.update_upload_access_control(self)
505:       sync_optimized_videos_secure_status(mark_secure)
506:     end
507: 
508:     secure_status_did_change
509:   end
510: 
511:   def sync_optimized_videos_secure_status(mark_secure)
512:     optimized_videos
513:       .includes(:optimized_upload)
514:       .each do |optimized_video|
515:         optimized_upload = optimized_video.optimized_upload
516:         if optimized_upload.secure? != mark_secure
517:           optimized_upload.update_secure_status(
518:             source: "sync_with_original_upload",
519:             override: mark_secure,
520:           )
521:         end
522:       end
523:   end
524: 
525:   def secure_params(secure, reason, source = "unknown")
526:     {
527:       secure: secure,
528:       security_last_changed_reason: reason + " | source: #{source}",
529:       security_last_changed_at: Time.zone.now,
530:     }
531:   end

533:   def self.migrate_to_new_scheme(limit: nil)
534:     problems = []
535: 
536:     DistributedMutex.synchronize("migrate_upload_to_new_scheme") do
537:       if SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme
538:         max_file_size_kb = [
539:           SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb,
540:           SiteSetting.max_attachment_size_kb,
541:         ].max.kilobytes
542: 
543:         local_store = FileStore::LocalStore.new
544:         db = RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.current_db
545: 
546:         scope =
547:           Upload
548:             .by_users
549:             .where("url NOT LIKE '%/original/_X/%' AND url LIKE ?", "%/uploads/#{db}%")
550:             .order(id: :desc)
551: 
552:         scope = scope.limit(limit) if limit
553: 
554:         if scope.count == 0
555:           SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme = false
556:           return problems
557:         end
558: 
559:         remap_scope = nil
560: 
561:         scope.each do |upload|
562:           begin
563:             # keep track of the url
564:             previous_url = upload.url.dup
565:             # where is the file currently stored?
566:             external = previous_url =~ %r{\A//}
567:             # download if external
568:             if external
569:               url = SiteSetting.scheme + ":" + previous_url
570: 
571:               begin
572:                 retries ||= 0
573: 
574:                 file =
575:                   FileHelper.download(
576:                     url,
577:                     max_file_size: max_file_size_kb,
578:                     tmp_file_name: "discourse",
579:                     follow_redirect: true,
580:                   )
581:               rescue OpenURI::HTTPError
582:                 retry if (retries += 1) < 1
583:                 next
584:               end
585: 
586:               path = file.path
587:             else
588:               path = local_store.path_for(upload)
589:             end
590:             # compute SHA if missing
591:             upload.sha1 = Upload.generate_digest(path) if upload.sha1.blank?
592: 
593:             # store to new location & update the filesize
594:             File.open(path) do |f|
595:               upload.url = Discourse.store.store_upload(f, upload)
596:               upload.filesize = f.size
597:               upload.save!(validate: false)
598:             end
599:             # remap the URLs
600:             DbHelper.remap(UrlHelper.absolute(previous_url), upload.url) unless external
601: 
602:             DbHelper.remap(
603:               previous_url,
604:               upload.url,
605:               excluded_tables: %w[
606:                 posts
607:                 post_search_data
608:                 incoming_emails
609:                 notifications
610:                 single_sign_on_records
611:                 stylesheet_cache
612:                 topic_search_data
613:                 users
614:                 user_emails
615:                 draft_sequences
616:                 optimized_images
617:               ],
618:             )
619: 
620:             remap_scope ||=
621:               begin
622:                 Post
623:                   .with_deleted
624:                   .where(
625:                     "raw ~ '/uploads/#{db}/\\d+/' OR raw ~ '/uploads/#{db}/original/(\\d|[a-z])/'",
626:                   )
627:                   .select(:id, :raw, :cooked)
628:                   .all
629:               end
630: 
631:             remap_scope.each do |post|
632:               post.raw.gsub!(previous_url, upload.url)
633:               post.cooked.gsub!(previous_url, upload.url)
634:               if post.changed?
635:                 Post.with_deleted.where(id: post.id).update_all(raw: post.raw, cooked: post.cooked)
636:               end
637:             end
638: 
639:             upload.optimized_images.find_each(&:destroy!)
640:             upload.rebake_posts_on_old_scheme
641:             # remove the old file (when local)
642:             FileUtils.rm(path, force: true) unless external
643:           rescue => e
644:             problems << { upload: upload, ex: e }
645:           ensure
646:             file&.unlink
647:             file&.close
648:           end
649:         end
650:       end
651:     end
652: 
653:     problems
654:   end

656:   def self.extract_upload_ids(raw)
657:     return [] if raw.blank?
658: 
659:     sha1s = []
660: 
661:     raw.scan(/\/(\h{40})/).each { |match| sha1s << match[0] }
662: 
663:     raw
664:       .scan(%r{/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)})
665:       .each { |match| sha1s << Upload.sha1_from_base62_encoded(match[0]) }
666: 
667:     Upload.where(sha1: sha1s.uniq).pluck(:id)
668:   end
669: 
670:   def self.backfill_dominant_colors!(count)
671:     Upload
672:       .where(dominant_color: nil)
673:       .order("id desc")
674:       .first(count)
675:       .each { |upload| upload.calculate_dominant_color! }
676:   end

684:   def should_convert_video?
685:     !skip_video_conversion && SiteSetting.video_conversion_enabled &&

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class UploadReference < ActiveRecord::Base
4:   belongs_to :upload
5:   belongs_to :target, polymorphic: true
6: 
7:   delegate :to_markdown, to: :upload
8: 
9:   def self.ensure_exist!(upload_ids: [], target: nil, target_type: nil, target_id: nil)
10:     if !target && !(target_type && target_id)
11:       raise "target OR target_type and target_id are required"
12:     end
13: 
14:     if target.present?
15:       target_type = target.class
16:       target_id = target.id
17:     end
18: 
19:     upload_ids = upload_ids.uniq.reject(&:blank?)
20:     target_type = target_type.to_s
21: 
22:     if upload_ids.empty?
23:       UploadReference.where(target_type: target_type, target_id: target_id).delete_all
24: 
25:       return
26:     end
27: 
28:     rows =
29:       upload_ids.map do |upload_id|
30:         {
31:           upload_id: upload_id,
32:           target_type: target_type,
33:           target_id: target_id,
34:           created_at: Time.zone.now,
35:           updated_at: Time.zone.now,
36:         }
37:       end
38: 
39:     UploadReference.transaction do |transaction|
40:       UploadReference
41:         .where(target_type: target_type, target_id: target_id)
42:         .where.not(upload_id: upload_ids)
43:         .delete_all
44: 
45:       UploadReference.insert_all(rows)
46:     end
47:   end
48: end
49:

34:   # Available options
35:   #  - type (string)
36:   #  - origin (string)
37:   #  - for_group_message (boolean)
38:   #  - for_theme (boolean)
39:   #  - for_private_message (boolean)

44:   def initialize(file, filename, opts = {})
45:     @file = file
46:     @filename = (filename || "").gsub(/[^[:print:]]/, "")
47:     @upload = Upload.new(original_filename: @filename, filesize: 0)
48:     @opts = opts
49:     @filesize = @opts[:filesize] if @opts[:external_upload_too_big]
50:     @opts[:validate] = (
51:       if opts[:skip_validations].present?
52:         !ActiveRecord::Type::Boolean.new.cast(opts[:skip_validations])
53:       else
54:         true
55:       end
56:     )
57:   end

59:   def create_for(user_id)
60:     if filesize <= 0
61:       @upload.errors.add(:base, I18n.t("upload.empty"))
62:       return @upload
63:     end
64: 
65:     @image_info =
66:       begin
67:         image = FastImage.new(@file)
68:         image.type # eager load to rescue errors early
69:         image
70:       rescue StandardError
71:         nil
72:       end
73:     is_image = FileHelper.is_supported_image?(@filename)
74:     is_image ||= @image_info && FileHelper.is_supported_image?("test.#{@image_info.type}")
75:     is_image = false if @opts[:for_theme]
76:     is_thumbnail = SiteSetting.video_thumbnails_enabled && @opts[:type] == "thumbnail"
77: 
78:     # If this is present then it means we are creating an upload record from
79:     # an external_upload_stub and the file is > ExternalUploadManager::DOWNLOAD_LIMIT,
80:     # so we have not downloaded it to a tempfile. no modifications can be made to the
81:     # file in this case because it does not exist; we simply move it to its new location
82:     # in S3
83:     #
84:     # FIXME: I've added a bunch of external_upload_too_big checks littered
85:     # throughout the UploadCreator code. It would be better to have two separate
86:     # classes with shared methods, rather than doing all these checks all over the
87:     # place. Needs a refactor.
88:     external_upload_too_big = @opts[:external_upload_too_big]
89:     sha1_before_changes = Upload.generate_digest(@file) if @file
90: 
91:     DistributedMutex.synchronize("upload_#{user_id}_#{@filename}") do
92:       # We need to convert HEIFs early because FastImage does not consider them as images
93:       if convert_heif_to_jpeg? && !external_upload_too_big
94:         convert_heif!
95:         is_image = FileHelper.is_supported_image?("test.#{@image_info.type}")
96:       end
97: 
98:       if is_image && !external_upload_too_big
99:         extract_image_info!
100:         return @upload if @upload.errors.present?
101: 
102:         if @image_info.type == :svg
103:           clean_svg!
104:         elsif @image_info.type == :ico
105:           convert_favicon_to_png!
106:         elsif !Rails.env.test? || @opts[:force_optimize]
107:           convert_to_jpeg! if convert_png_to_jpeg? || should_alter_quality?
108:           fix_orientation! if should_fix_orientation?
109:           crop! if should_crop?
110:           optimize! if should_optimize?
111:           downsize! if should_downsize?
112:           return @upload if is_still_too_big?
113:         end
114: 
115:         # conversion may have switched the type
116:         image_type = @image_info.type.to_s
117:       end
118: 
119:       # compute the sha of the file and generate a unique hash
120:       # which is only used for secure uploads
121:       sha1 = Upload.generate_digest(@file) if !external_upload_too_big
122:       unique_hash = generate_fake_sha1_hash if SiteSetting.secure_uploads ||
123:         external_upload_too_big || is_thumbnail
124: 
125:       # we do not check for duplicate uploads if secure uploads is
126:       # enabled because we use a unique access hash to differentiate
127:       # between uploads instead of the sha1, and to get around various
128:       # access/permission issues for uploads
129:       # We do not check for duplicate uploads for video thumbnails because
130:       # their filename needs to match with their corresponding video. This also
131:       # enables rebuilding the html on a topic to regenerate a thumbnail.
132:       if !SiteSetting.secure_uploads && !external_upload_too_big && !is_thumbnail
133:         # do we already have that upload?
134:         @upload = Upload.find_by(sha1: sha1)
135: 
136:         # make sure the previous upload has not failed
137:         if @upload && @upload.url.blank?
138:           @upload.destroy
139:           @upload = nil
140:         end
141: 
142:         # return the previous upload if any
143:         if @upload
144:           add_metadata!
145:           UserUpload.find_or_create_by!(user_id: user_id, upload_id: @upload.id) if user_id
146:           return @upload
147:         end
148:       end
149: 
150:       fixed_original_filename = nil
151: 
152:       if is_image && !external_upload_too_big
153:         current_extension = File.extname(@filename).downcase.sub("jpeg", "jpg")
154:         expected_extension = ".#{image_type}".downcase.sub("jpeg", "jpg")
155: 
156:         # we have to correct original filename here, no choice
157:         # otherwise validation will fail and we can not save
158:         # TODO decide if we only run the validation on the extension
159:         if current_extension != expected_extension
160:           basename = File.basename(@filename, current_extension).presence || "image"
161:           fixed_original_filename = "#{basename}#{expected_extension}"
162:         end
163:       end
164: 
165:       # create the upload otherwise
166:       @upload = Upload.new
167:       @upload.user_id = user_id
168:       @upload.original_filename = fixed_original_filename || @filename
169:       @upload.filesize = filesize
170:       @upload.sha1 =
171:         (
172:           if (SiteSetting.secure_uploads? || external_upload_too_big || is_thumbnail)
173:             unique_hash
174:           else
175:             sha1
176:           end
177:         )
178:       @upload.original_sha1 = SiteSetting.secure_uploads? ? sha1 : nil
179:       @upload.url = ""
180:       @upload.origin = @opts[:origin][0...2000] if @opts[:origin]
181:       @upload.extension = image_type || File.extname(@filename)[1..10]
182: 
183:       if is_image && !external_upload_too_big
184:         if @image_info.type.to_s == "svg"
185:           w, h = [0, 0]
186: 
187:           # identify can behave differently depending on how it's compiled and
188:           # what programs (e.g. inkscape) are installed on your system.
189:           # 'MSVG:' forces ImageMagick to use internal routines and behave
190:           # consistently whether it's running from our docker container or not
191:           begin
192:             w, h =
193:               Discourse::Utils
194:                 .execute_command(
195:                   "identify",
196:                   "-ping",
197:                   "-format",
198:                   "%w %h",
199:                   "MSVG:#{@file.path}",
200:                   timeout: Upload::MAX_IDENTIFY_SECONDS,
201:                 )
202:                 .split(" ")
203:                 .map(&:to_i)
204:           rescue StandardError
205:             # use default 0, 0
206:           end
207:         else
208:           w, h = @image_info.size
209:         end
210: 
211:         @upload.thumbnail_width, @upload.thumbnail_height = ImageSizer.resize(w, h)
212:         @upload.width, @upload.height = w, h
213:         @upload.animated = animated?
214:         @upload.calculate_dominant_color!(@file.path)
215:       end
216: 
217:       add_metadata!
218: 
219:       if SiteSetting.secure_uploads
220:         secure, reason =
221:           UploadSecurity.new(@upload, @opts.merge(creating: true)).should_be_secure_with_reason
222:         attrs = @upload.secure_params(secure, reason, "upload creator")
223:         @upload.assign_attributes(attrs)
224:       end
225: 
226:       # Callbacks using this event to validate the upload or the file must add errors to the
227:       # upload errors object.
228:       #
229:       # Can't do any validation of the file if external_upload_too_big because we don't have
230:       # the actual file.
231:       if !external_upload_too_big
232:         DiscourseEvent.trigger(:before_upload_creation, @file, is_image, @upload, @opts[:validate])
233:       end
234:       return @upload unless @upload.errors.empty? && @upload.save(validate: @opts[:validate])
235: 
236:       should_move = false
237:       upload_changed =
238:         if external_upload_too_big
239:           false
240:         else
241:           Upload.generate_digest(@file) != sha1_before_changes
242:         end
243: 
244:       store = Discourse.store
245: 
246:       if @opts[:existing_external_upload_key] && store.external?
247:         should_move = external_upload_too_big || !upload_changed
248:       end
249: 
250:       if should_move
251:         # move the file in the store instead of reuploading
252:         url =
253:           store.move_existing_stored_upload(
254:             existing_external_upload_key: @opts[:existing_external_upload_key],
255:             upload: @upload,
256:           )
257:       else
258:         # store the file and update its url
259:         File.open(@file.path) { |f| url = store.store_upload(f, @upload) }
260:         if @opts[:existing_external_upload_key]
261:           store.delete_file(@opts[:existing_external_upload_key])
262:         end
263:       end
264: 
265:       if url.present?
266:         @upload.url = url
267:         @upload.save!(validate: @opts[:validate])
268:       else
269:         @upload.errors.add(
270:           :url,
271:           I18n.t("upload.store_failure", upload_id: @upload.id, user_id: user_id),
272:         )
273:       end
274: 
275:       if @upload.errors.empty? && is_image && @opts[:type] == "avatar" && @upload.extension != "svg"
276:         Jobs.enqueue(:create_avatar_thumbnails, upload_id: @upload.id)
277:       end
278: 
279:       if @upload.errors.empty?
280:         UserUpload.find_or_create_by!(user_id: user_id, upload_id: @upload.id) if user_id
281:       end
282: 
283:       @upload
284:     end
285:   ensure
286:     if @file
287:       @file.respond_to?(:close!) ? @file.close! : @file.close
288:     end
289:   end

291:   def extract_image_info!
292:     @image_info =
293:       begin
294:         image = FastImage.new(@file)
295:         image.type # eager load to rescue errors early
296:         image
297:       rescue StandardError
298:         nil
299:       end
300:     @file.rewind
301: 
302:     if @image_info.nil?
303:       @upload.errors.add(:base, I18n.t("upload.images.not_supported_or_corrupted"))
304:     elsif filesize <= 0
305:       @upload.errors.add(:base, I18n.t("upload.empty"))
306:     elsif pixels == 0 && @image_info.type.to_s != "svg"
307:       @upload.errors.add(:base, I18n.t("upload.images.size_not_found"))
308:     elsif max_image_pixels > 0 && pixels >= max_image_pixels
309:       @upload.errors.add(
310:         :base,
311:         I18n.t(
312:           "upload.images.larger_than_x_megapixels",
313:           max_image_megapixels: SiteSetting.max_image_megapixels,
314:           original_filename: @upload.original_filename,
315:         ),
316:       )
317:     end
318:   end

320:   MIN_PIXELS_TO_CONVERT_TO_JPEG = 1280 * 720
321: 
322:   def convert_png_to_jpeg?
323:     return false unless @image_info.type == :png
324:     return true if @opts[:pasted]
325:     return false if SiteSetting.ImageQuality.png_to_jpg_quality == 100
326:     pixels > MIN_PIXELS_TO_CONVERT_TO_JPEG
327:   end

329:   MIN_CONVERT_TO_JPEG_BYTES_SAVED = 75_000
330:   MIN_CONVERT_TO_JPEG_SAVING_RATIO = 0.70

332:   def convert_favicon_to_png!
333:     png_tempfile = Tempfile.new(%w[image .png])
334: 
335:     from = @file.path
336:     to = png_tempfile.path
337: 
338:     OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(from, to)
339: 
340:     from = OptimizedImage.prepend_decoder!(from, nil, filename: "image.#{@image_info.type}")
341:     to = OptimizedImage.prepend_decoder!(to)
342: 
343:     from = "#{from}[-1]" # We only want the last(largest) image of the .ico file
344: 
345:     opts = { flatten: false } # Preserve transparency
346: 
347:     begin
348:       execute_convert(from, to, opts)
349:     rescue StandardError
350:       # retry with debugging enabled
351:       execute_convert(from, to, opts.merge(debug: true))
352:     end
353: 
354:     @file.respond_to?(:close!) ? @file.close! : @file.close
355:     @file = png_tempfile
356:     extract_image_info!
357:   end

359:   def convert_to_jpeg!
360:     return if @opts[:for_site_setting]
361:     return if filesize < MIN_CONVERT_TO_JPEG_BYTES_SAVED
362: 
363:     jpeg_tempfile = Tempfile.new(%w[image .jpg])
364: 
365:     from = @file.path
366:     to = jpeg_tempfile.path
367: 
368:     OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(from, to)
369: 
370:     from = OptimizedImage.prepend_decoder!(from, nil, filename: "image.#{@image_info.type}")
371:     to = OptimizedImage.prepend_decoder!(to)
372: 
373:     opts = {}
374: 
375:     desired_quality = [
376:       SiteSetting.ImageQuality.png_to_jpg_quality,
377:       SiteSetting.ImageQuality.recompress_original_jpg_quality,
378:     ].compact.min
379: 
380:     target_quality = @upload.target_image_quality(from, desired_quality)
381:     opts = { quality: target_quality } if target_quality
382: 
383:     begin
384:       execute_convert(from, to, opts)
385:     rescue StandardError
386:       # retry with debugging enabled
387:       execute_convert(from, to, opts.merge(debug: true))
388:     end
389: 
390:     new_size = File.size(jpeg_tempfile.path)
391: 
392:     keep_jpeg = new_size < filesize * MIN_CONVERT_TO_JPEG_SAVING_RATIO
393:     keep_jpeg &&= (filesize - new_size) > MIN_CONVERT_TO_JPEG_BYTES_SAVED
394: 
395:     if keep_jpeg
396:       @file.respond_to?(:close!) ? @file.close! : @file.close
397:       @file = jpeg_tempfile
398:       extract_image_info!
399:     else
400:       jpeg_tempfile.close!
401:     end
402:   end

404:   def convert_heif_to_jpeg?
405:     File.extname(@filename).downcase.match?(/\.hei(f|c)\z/)
406:   end

408:   def convert_heif!
409:     jpeg_tempfile = Tempfile.new(%w[image .jpg])
410:     from = @file.path
411:     to = jpeg_tempfile.path
412:     OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(from, to)
413: 
414:     begin
415:       execute_convert(from, to)
416:     rescue StandardError
417:       # retry with debugging enabled
418:       execute_convert(from, to, { debug: true })
419:     end
420: 
421:     @file.respond_to?(:close!) ? @file.close! : @file.close
422:     @file = jpeg_tempfile
423:     extract_image_info!
424:   end

426:   MAX_CONVERT_FORMAT_SECONDS = 20
427:   def execute_convert(from, to, opts = {})
428:     command = ["magick", from, "-auto-orient", "-background", "white", "-interlace", "none"]
429:     command << "-flatten" unless opts[:flatten] == false
430:     command << "-debug" << "all" if opts[:debug]
431:     command << "-quality" << opts[:quality].to_s if opts[:quality]
432:     command << to
433: 
434:     Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
435:       *command,
436:       failure_message: I18n.t("upload.png_to_jpg_conversion_failure_message"),
437:       timeout: MAX_CONVERT_FORMAT_SECONDS,
438:     )
439:   end

441:   def should_alter_quality?
442:     return false if animated?
443: 
444:     desired_quality =
445:       (
446:         if @image_info.type == :png
447:           SiteSetting.ImageQuality.png_to_jpg_quality
448:         else
449:           SiteSetting.ImageQuality.recompress_original_jpg_quality
450:         end
451:       )
452: 
453:     @upload.target_image_quality(@file.path, desired_quality).present?
454:   end

456:   def should_downsize?
457:     max_image_size > 0 && filesize >= max_image_size && !animated?
458:   end
459: 
460:   def downsize!
461:     3.times do
462:       original_size = filesize
463:       down_tempfile = Tempfile.new(["down", ".#{@image_info.type}"])
464: 
465:       from = @file.path
466:       to = down_tempfile.path
467: 
468:       OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(from, to)
469: 
470:       OptimizedImage.downsize(from, to, "50%", scale_image: true, raise_on_error: true)
471: 
472:       @file.respond_to?(:close!) ? @file.close! : @file.close
473:       @file = down_tempfile
474: 
475:       extract_image_info!
476: 
477:       return if filesize >= original_size || pixels == 0 || !should_downsize?
478:     end
479:   rescue StandardError
480:     @upload.errors.add(:base, I18n.t("upload.optimize_failure_message"))
481:   end

483:   def is_still_too_big?
484:     if max_image_pixels > 0 && pixels >= max_image_pixels
485:       @upload.errors.add(
486:         :base,
487:         I18n.t(
488:           "upload.images.larger_than_x_megapixels",
489:           max_image_megapixels: SiteSetting.max_image_megapixels,
490:           original_filename: @upload.original_filename,
491:         ),
492:       )
493:       true
494:     elsif max_image_size > 0 && filesize >= max_image_size
495:       @upload.errors.add(
496:         :base,
497:         I18n.t(
498:           "upload.images.too_large_humanized",
499:           max_size: ActiveSupport::NumberHelper.number_to_human_size(max_image_size),
500:         ),
501:       )
502:       true
503:     else
504:       false
505:     end
506:   end

508:   def clean_svg!
509:     doc = Nokogiri.XML(@file)
510:     doc.xpath(svg_allowlist_xpath).remove
511:     doc.xpath("//@*[starts-with(name(), 'on')]").remove
512:     doc
513:       .css("use")
514:       .each do |use_el|
515:         if use_el.attr("href")
516:           use_el.remove_attribute("href") unless use_el.attr("href").starts_with?("#")
517:         end
518:         use_el.remove_attribute("xlink:href")
519:       end
520: 
521:     File.write(@file.path, doc.to_s)
522:     @file.rewind
523:   end

526:     # orientation is between 1 and 8, 1 being the default
527:     # cf. http://www.daveperrett.com/articles/2012/07/28/exif-orientation-handling-is-a-ghetto/
528:     @image_info.orientation.to_i > 1

531:   MAX_FIX_ORIENTATION_TIME = 5
532:   def fix_orientation!
533:     path = @file.path
534: 
535:     OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(path)
536:     path = OptimizedImage.prepend_decoder!(path, nil, filename: "image.#{@image_info.type}")
537: 
538:     Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
539:       "magick",
540:       path,
541:       "-auto-orient",
542:       path,
543:       timeout: MAX_FIX_ORIENTATION_TIME,
544:     )
545: 
546:     extract_image_info!
547:   end
548: 
549:   def should_crop?
550:     if %w[profile_background card_background custom_emoji].include?(@opts[:type]) && animated?
551:       return false
552:     end
553: 
554:     TYPES_TO_CROP.include?(@opts[:type])
555:   end
556: 
557:   def crop!
558:     max_pixel_ratio = Discourse::PIXEL_RATIOS.max
559:     filename_with_correct_ext = "image.#{@image_info.type}"
560: 
561:     case @opts[:type]
562:     when "avatar"
563:       width = height = Discourse.avatar_sizes.max
564:       OptimizedImage.resize(
565:         @file.path,
566:         @file.path,
567:         width,
568:         height,
569:         filename: filename_with_correct_ext,
570:       )
571:     when "profile_background"
572:       max_width = 850 * max_pixel_ratio
573:       width, height =
574:         ImageSizer.resize(
575:           @image_info.size[0],
576:           @image_info.size[1],
577:           max_width: max_width,
578:           max_height: max_width,
579:         )
580:       OptimizedImage.downsize(
581:         @file.path,
582:         @file.path,
583:         "#{width}x#{height}\>",
584:         filename: filename_with_correct_ext,
585:       )
586:     when "card_background"
587:       max_width = 590 * max_pixel_ratio
588:       width, height =
589:         ImageSizer.resize(
590:           @image_info.size[0],
591:           @image_info.size[1],
592:           max_width: max_width,
593:           max_height: max_width,
594:         )
595:       OptimizedImage.downsize(
596:         @file.path,
597:         @file.path,
598:         "#{width}x#{height}\>",
599:         filename: filename_with_correct_ext,
600:       )
601:     when "custom_emoji"
602:       OptimizedImage.downsize(
603:         @file.path,
604:         @file.path,
605:         "100x100\>",
606:         filename: filename_with_correct_ext,
607:       )
608:     end
609: 
610:     extract_image_info!
611:   end
612: 
613:   def should_optimize?
614:     # GIF is too slow (plus, we'll soon be converting them to MP4)
615:     # Optimizing SVG is useless
616:     return false if @file.path =~ /\.(gif|svg)\z/i
617:     # Safeguard for large PNGs
618:     return pixels < 2_000_000 if @file.path =~ /\.png/i
619:     # Everything else is fine!
620:     true
621:   end
622: 
623:   def optimize!
624:     OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(@file.path)
625:     FileHelper.optimize_image!(@file.path)
626:     extract_image_info!
627:   end
628: 
629:   def filesize
630:     @filesize || File.size?(@file.path).to_i
631:   end
632: 
633:   def max_image_size
634:     @max_image_size ||= SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb.kilobytes
635:   end
636: 
637:   def max_image_pixels
638:     @max_image_pixels ||= SiteSetting.max_image_megapixels * 1_000_000
639:   end
640: 
641:   def pixels
642:     @image_info.size&.reduce(:*).to_i
643:   end
644: 
645:   def svg_allowlist_xpath
646:     @@svg_allowlist_xpath ||=
647:       "//*[#{ALLOWED_SVG_ELEMENTS.map { |e| "name()!='#{e}'" }.join(" and ")}]"
648:   end
649: 
650:   def add_metadata!
651:     @upload.for_private_message = true if @opts[:for_private_message]
652:     @upload.for_group_message = true if @opts[:for_group_message]
653:     @upload.for_theme = true if @opts[:for_theme]
654:     @upload.for_export = true if @opts[:for_export]
655:     @upload.for_site_setting = true if @opts[:for_site_setting]
656:     @upload.site_setting_name = @opts[:site_setting_name] if @opts[:site_setting_name]
657:     @upload.for_gravatar = true if @opts[:for_gravatar]
658:   end
659: 
660:   private
661: 
662:   def animated?
663:     return @animated if @animated != nil
664: 
665:     @animated ||=
666:       begin
667:         is_animated = FastImage.animated?(@file)
668:         type = @image_info.type.to_s
669: 
670:         if is_animated != nil
671:           # FastImage will return nil if it cannot determine if animated
672:           is_animated
673:         elsif %w[gif webp avif].include?(type)
674:           # Only GIFs, WEBPs and a few other unsupported image types can be animated
675:           OptimizedImage.ensure_safe_paths!(@file.path)
676: 
677:           command = ["identify", "-ping", "-format", "%n\\n", @file.path]
678:           frames =
679:             begin
680:               Discourse::Utils.execute_command(*command, timeout: Upload::MAX_IDENTIFY_SECONDS).to_i
681:             rescue StandardError
682:               1
683:             end
684: 
685:           frames > 1
686:         else
687:           false
688:         end
689:       end
690:   end
691: 
692:   def generate_fake_sha1_hash
693:     SecureRandom.hex(20)
694:   end
695: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class UploadMarkdown
4:   def initialize(upload)
5:     @upload = upload
6:   end
7: 
8:   def to_markdown(display_name: nil)
9:     if FileHelper.is_supported_image?(@upload.original_filename)
10:       image_markdown(display_name: display_name)
11:     elsif FileHelper.is_supported_playable_media?(@upload.original_filename)
12:       playable_media_markdown(display_name: display_name)
13:     else
14:       attachment_markdown(display_name: display_name)
15:     end
16:   end
17: 
18:   def image_markdown(display_name: nil)
19:     display_name ||= @upload.original_filename
20:     "![#{self.class.escape_markdown(display_name)}|#{@upload.width}x#{@upload.height}](#{@upload.short_url})"
21:   end
22: 
23:   def attachment_markdown(display_name: nil, with_filesize: true)
24:     human_filesize = with_filesize ? " (#{@upload.human_filesize})" : ""
25:     display_name ||= @upload.original_filename
26: 
27:     "[#{self.class.escape_markdown(display_name)}|attachment](#{@upload.short_url})#{human_filesize}"
28:   end
29: 
30:   def playable_media_markdown(display_name: nil)
31:     type =
32:       if FileHelper.is_supported_audio?(@upload.original_filename)
33:         "audio"
34:       elsif FileHelper.is_supported_video?(@upload.original_filename)
35:         "video"
36:       end
37:     return attachment_markdown if !type
38:     display_name ||= @upload.original_filename
39:     "![#{self.class.escape_markdown(display_name)}|#{type}](#{@upload.short_url})"
40:   end
41: 
42:   def self.escape_markdown(text)
43:     text.gsub(/[\\*_~`\[\]|]/) { |c| "\\#{c}" }
44:   end
45: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: require "mini_mime"
4: 
5: class UploadsController < ApplicationController
6:   include ExternalUploadHelpers
7:   include SecureUploadEndpointHelpers
8: 
9:   requires_login except: %i[show show_short _show_secure_deprecated show_secure]
10: 
11:   skip_before_action :preload_json,
12:                      :check_xhr,
13:                      :redirect_to_login_if_required,
14:                      :redirect_to_profile_if_required,
15:                      only: %i[show show_short _show_secure_deprecated show_secure]
16:   protect_from_forgery except: :show
17: 
18:   before_action :is_asset_path,
19:                 :apply_cdn_headers,
20:                 only: %i[show show_short _show_secure_deprecated show_secure]
21:   before_action :external_store_check, only: %i[_show_secure_deprecated show_secure]
22: 
23:   SECURE_REDIRECT_GRACE_SECONDS = 5
24: 
25:   def create
26:     # capture current user for block later on
27:     me = current_user
28:     RateLimiter.new(
29:       current_user,
30:       "uploads-per-minute",
31:       SiteSetting.max_uploads_per_minute,
32:       1.minute,
33:     ).performed!
34: 
35:     type =
36:       if params[:upload_type].presence
37:         params[:upload_type]
38:       elsif params[:type].presence
39:         Discourse.deprecate(
40:           "the :type param of `POST /uploads` is deprecated, use the :upload_type param instead",
41:           since: "3.4",
42:           drop_from: "3.5",
43:         )
44:         params[:type]
45:       else
46:         params.require(:upload_type)
47:       end
48:     # 50 characters ought to be enough for the upload type
49:     type = type.parameterize(separator: "_")[0..50]
50: 
51:     if type == "avatar" &&
52:          (
53:            SiteSetting.discourse_connect_overrides_avatar || SiteSetting.auth_overrides_avatar ||
54:              !me.in_any_groups?(SiteSetting.uploaded_avatars_allowed_groups_map)
55:          )
56:       return render json: failed_json, status: :unprocessable_entity
57:     end
58: 
59:     url = params[:url]
60:     file = params[:file] || params[:files]&.first
61:     pasted = params[:pasted] == "true"
62:     for_private_message = params[:for_private_message] == "true"
63:     for_site_setting = params[:for_site_setting] == "true"
64:     site_setting_name = for_site_setting ? params[:site_setting_name] : nil
65:     is_api = is_api?
66:     retain_hours = params[:retain_hours].to_i
67: 
68:     # note, atm hijack is processed in its own context and has not access to controller
69:     # longer term we may change this
70:     hijack do
71:       begin
72:         info =
73:           UploadsController.create_upload(
74:             current_user: me,
75:             file:,
76:             url:,
77:             type:,
78:             for_private_message:,
79:             for_site_setting:,
80:             site_setting_name:,
81:             pasted:,
82:             is_api:,
83:             retain_hours:,
84:           )
85:       rescue => e
86:         render json: failed_json.merge(message: e.message&.split("\n")&.first),
87:                status: :unprocessable_entity
88:       else
89:         render json: UploadsController.serialize_upload(info), status: Upload === info ? 200 : 422
90:       end
91:     end
92:   end
93: 
94:   def lookup_urls
95:     params.permit(short_urls: [])
96:     uploads = []
97: 
98:     if (params[:short_urls] && params[:short_urls].length > 0)
99:       PrettyText::Helpers
100:         .lookup_upload_urls(params[:short_urls])
101:         .each do |short_url, paths|
102:           uploads << { short_url: short_url, url: paths[:url], short_path: paths[:short_path] }
103:         end
104:     end
105: 
106:     render json: uploads.to_json
107:   end
108: 
109:   def show
110:     # do not serve uploads requested via XHR to prevent XSS
111:     return xhr_not_allowed if request.xhr?
112: 
113:     return render_404 if !RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.has_db?(params[:site])
114: 
115:     begin
116:       request_site_current_user =
117:         request.env.delete(Auth::DefaultCurrentUserProvider::CURRENT_USER_KEY)
118: 
119:       RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.with_connection(params[:site]) do |db|
120:         begin
121:           # current_user here refers to the user for the site that we are operating on
122:           # using with_connection. If DB for the target site matches the current site
123:           # for the request, then current_user will be the same as the request_site_current_user
124:           return render_404 if SiteSetting.prevent_anons_from_downloading_files && current_user.nil?
125: 
126:           upload =
127:             Upload.find_by(sha1: params[:sha]) ||
128:               Upload.find_by(id: params[:id], url: request.env["PATH_INFO"])
129: 
130:           if upload.present?
131:             if !Discourse.store.internal?
132:               local_store = FileStore::LocalStore.new
133:               return render_404 unless local_store.has_been_uploaded?(upload.url)
134:             end
135: 
136:             send_file_local_upload(upload)
137:           else
138:             render_404
139:           end
140:         end
141:       end
142:     ensure
143:       request.env[Auth::DefaultCurrentUserProvider::CURRENT_USER_KEY] = request_site_current_user
144:     end
145:   end
146: 
147:   def show_short
148:     # do not serve uploads requested via XHR to prevent XSS
149:     return xhr_not_allowed if request.xhr?
150: 
151:     return render_404 if SiteSetting.prevent_anons_from_downloading_files && current_user.nil?
152: 
153:     sha1 = Upload.sha1_from_base62_encoded(params[:base62])
154: 
155:     if upload = Upload.find_by(sha1: sha1)
156:       return handle_secure_upload_request(upload) if upload.secure? && SiteSetting.secure_uploads?
157: 
158:       if Discourse.store.internal?
159:         send_file_local_upload(upload)
160:       else
161:         redirect_to Discourse.store.url_for(upload, force_download: force_download?),
162:                     allow_other_host: true
163:       end
164:     else
165:       render_404
166:     end
167:   end
168: 
169:   # Kept to avoid rebaking old posts with /show-secure-uploads/ in their
170:   # contents, this will ensure the uploads in these posts continue to
171:   # work in future.
172:   def _show_secure_deprecated
173:     show_secure
174:   end
175: 
176:   def show_secure
177:     # do not serve uploads requested via XHR to prevent XSS
178:     return xhr_not_allowed if request.xhr?
179: 
180:     path_with_ext =
181:       params[:extension].nil? ? params[:path] : "#{params[:path]}.#{params[:extension]}"
182:     upload = upload_from_path_and_extension(path_with_ext)
183: 
184:     return render_404 if upload.blank?
185: 
186:     return render_404 if SiteSetting.prevent_anons_from_downloading_files && current_user.nil?
187:     return handle_secure_upload_request(upload, path_with_ext) if SiteSetting.secure_uploads?
188: 
189:     # we don't want to 404 here if secure uploads gets disabled
190:     # because all posts with secure uploads will show broken media
191:     # until rebaked, which could take some time
192:     #
193:     # if the upload is still secure, that means the ACL is probably still
194:     # private, so we don't want to go to the CDN url just yet otherwise we
195:     # will get a 403. if the upload is not secure we assume the ACL is public
196:     signed_secure_url =
197:       Discourse.store.signed_url_for_path(
198:         path_with_ext,
199:         filename: upload.original_filename,
200:         include_content_disposition: true,
201:       )
202:     redirect_to upload.secure? ? signed_secure_url : Discourse.store.cdn_url(upload.url),
203:                 allow_other_host: true
204:   end
205: 
206:   def handle_secure_upload_request(upload, path_with_ext = nil)
207:     check_secure_upload_permission(upload)
208: 
209:     # defaults to public: false, so only cached by the client browser
210:     cache_seconds =
211:       SiteSetting.s3_presigned_get_url_expires_after_seconds - SECURE_REDIRECT_GRACE_SECONDS
212:     expires_in cache_seconds.seconds
213: 
214:     # url_for figures out the full URL, handling multisite DBs,
215:     # and will return a presigned URL for the upload
216:     if path_with_ext.blank?
217:       return(
218:         redirect_to Discourse.store.url_for(upload, force_download: force_download?),
219:                     allow_other_host: true
220:       )
221:     end
222: 
223:     redirect_to Discourse.store.signed_url_for_path(
224:                   path_with_ext,
225:                   expires_in: SiteSetting.s3_presigned_get_url_expires_after_seconds,
226:                   force_download: force_download?,
227:                   filename: upload.original_filename,
228:                   include_content_disposition: true,
229:                 ),
230:                 allow_other_host: true
231:   end
232: 
233:   def metadata
234:     params.require(:url)
235:     upload = Upload.get_from_url(params[:url])
236:     raise Discourse::NotFound unless upload
237: 
238:     render json: {
239:              original_filename: upload.original_filename,
240:              width: upload.width,
241:              height: upload.height,
242:              human_filesize: upload.human_filesize,
243:            }
244:   end
245: 
246:   protected
247: 
248:   def validate_before_create_multipart(file_name:, file_size:, upload_type:)
249:     validate_file_size(file_name: file_name, file_size: file_size)
250:   end
251: 
252:   def validate_before_create_direct_upload(file_name:, file_size:, upload_type:)
253:     validate_file_size(file_name: file_name, file_size: file_size)
254:   end
255: 
256:   def validate_file_size(file_name:, file_size:)
257:     raise ExternalUploadValidationError.new(I18n.t("upload.size_zero_failure")) if file_size.zero?
258: 
259:     if attachment_too_big?(file_name, file_size)
260:       raise ExternalUploadValidationError.new(
261:               I18n.t(
262:                 "upload.attachments.too_large_humanized",
263:                 max_size:
264:                   ActiveSupport::NumberHelper.number_to_human_size(
265:                     UploadsController.max_attachment_size_for_user(current_user).kilobytes,
266:                   ),
267:               ),
268:             )
269:     end
270: 
271:     if image_too_big?(file_name, file_size)
272:       raise ExternalUploadValidationError.new(
273:               I18n.t(
274:                 "upload.images.too_large_humanized",
275:                 max_size:
276:                   ActiveSupport::NumberHelper.number_to_human_size(
277:                     SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb.kilobytes,
278:                   ),
279:               ),
280:             )
281:     end
282:   end
283: 
284:   def force_download?
285:     params[:dl] == "1"
286:   end
287: 
288:   def xhr_not_allowed
289:     raise Discourse::InvalidParameters.new("XHR not allowed")
290:   end
291: 
292:   def self.serialize_upload(data)
293:     # as_json.as_json is not a typo... as_json in AM serializer returns keys as symbols, we need them
294:     # as strings here
295:     serialized = UploadSerializer.new(data, root: nil).as_json.as_json if Upload === data
296:     serialized ||= (data || {}).as_json
297:   end
298: 
299:   def self.create_upload(
300:     current_user:,
301:     file:,
302:     url:,
303:     type:,
304:     for_private_message:,
305:     for_site_setting:,
306:     site_setting_name: nil,
307:     pasted:,
308:     is_api:,
309:     retain_hours:
310:   )
311:     if file.nil?
312:       if url.present? && is_api
313:         maximum_upload_size = [
314:           SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb,
315:           UploadsController.max_attachment_size_for_user(current_user),
316:         ].max.kilobytes
317:         tempfile =
318:           begin
319:             FileHelper.download(
320:               url,
321:               follow_redirect: true,
322:               max_file_size: maximum_upload_size,
323:               tmp_file_name: "discourse-upload-#{type}",
324:             )
325:           rescue StandardError
326:             nil
327:           end
328:         filename = File.basename(URI.parse(url).path)
329:       end
330:     else
331:       tempfile = file.tempfile
332:       filename = file.original_filename
333:     end
334: 
335:     return { errors: [I18n.t("upload.file_missing")] } if tempfile.nil?
336: 
337:     opts = { type:, for_private_message:, for_site_setting:, site_setting_name:, pasted: }
338: 
339:     upload = UploadCreator.new(tempfile, filename, opts).create_for(current_user.id)
340: 
341:     if upload.errors.empty? && current_user.admin?
342:       upload.update_columns(retain_hours: retain_hours) if retain_hours > 0
343:     end
344: 
345:     upload.errors.empty? ? upload : { errors: upload.errors.to_hash.values.flatten }
346:   ensure
347:     tempfile&.close!
348:   end
349: 
350:   private
351: 
352:   def self.max_attachment_size_for_user(user)
353:     if user.id == Discourse::SYSTEM_USER_ID && !SiteSetting.system_user_max_attachment_size_kb.zero?
354:       SiteSetting.system_user_max_attachment_size_kb
355:     else
356:       SiteSetting.max_attachment_size_kb
357:     end
358:   end
359: 
360:   # We can preemptively check size for attachments, but not for (most) images
361:   # as they may be further reduced in size by UploadCreator (at this point
362:   # they may have already been reduced in size by preprocessors)
363:   def attachment_too_big?(file_name, file_size)
364:     !FileHelper.is_supported_image?(file_name) &&
365:       file_size >= UploadsController.max_attachment_size_for_user(current_user).kilobytes
366:   end
367: 
368:   # Gifs are not resized on the client and not reduced in size by UploadCreator
369:   def image_too_big?(file_name, file_size)
370:     FileHelper.is_supported_image?(file_name) && File.extname(file_name) == ".gif" &&
371:       file_size >= SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb.kilobytes
372:   end
373: 
374:   def send_file_local_upload(upload)
375:     opts = {
376:       filename: upload.original_filename,
377:       content_type: MiniMime.lookup_by_filename(upload.original_filename)&.content_type,
378:     }
379: 
380:     if !FileHelper.is_inline_safe?(upload.original_filename)
381:       opts[:disposition] = "attachment"
382:     elsif params[:inline]
383:       opts[:disposition] = "inline"
384:     end
385: 
386:     response.headers["Content-Security-Policy"] = "sandbox;"
387: 
388:     file_path = Discourse.store.path_for(upload)
389:     return render_404 unless file_path && File.exist?(file_path)
390: 
391:     send_file(file_path, opts)
392:   end
393: 
394:   def create_direct_multipart_upload
395:     begin
396:       yield
397:     rescue Aws::S3::Errors::ServiceError => err
398:       message =
399:         debug_upload_error(
400:           err,
401:           I18n.t("upload.create_multipart_failure", additional_detail: err.message),
402:         )
403:       raise ExternalUploadHelpers::ExternalUploadValidationError.new(message)
404:     end
405:   end
406: end

20: 
21:   def check_chunk
22:     # check whether the chunk has already been uploaded
23:     has_chunk_been_uploaded =
24:       File.exist?(@chunk) && File.size(@chunk) == @params[:current_chunk_size]
25:     # 200 = exists, 404 = not uploaded yet
26:     has_chunk_been_uploaded ? 200 : 404
27:   end
28: 
29:   def upload_chunk
30:     # path to chunk file
31:     dir = File.dirname(@chunk)
32:     # ensure directory exists
33:     FileUtils.mkdir_p(dir) unless Dir.exist?(dir)
34:     # save chunk to the directory
35:     File.open(@chunk, "wb") { |f| f.write(@params[:file].tempfile.read) }
36:   end

42:     filename = @params[:filename]

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: module Jobs
4:   class MigrateUploadScheme < ::Jobs::Scheduled
5:     every 10.minutes
6:     sidekiq_options retry: false
7: 
8:     def execute(args)
9:       return unless SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme
10: 
11:       # clean up failed uploads
12:       Upload
13:         .where("created_at < ?", 1.hour.ago)
14:         .where("LENGTH(COALESCE(url, '')) = 0")
15:         .find_each { |upload| upload.destroy! }
16: 
17:       # migrate uploads to new scheme
18:       problems = Upload.migrate_to_new_scheme(limit: 50)
19: 
20:       problems.each do |hash|
21:         upload_id = hash[:upload].id
22:         Discourse.handle_job_exception(
23:           hash[:ex],
24:           error_context(args, "Migrating upload id #{upload_id}", upload_id: upload_id),
25:         )
26:       end
27: 
28:       # clean up failed optimized images
29:       OptimizedImage
30:         .where("LENGTH(COALESCE(url, '')) = 0")
31:         .find_each { |optimized_image| optimized_image.destroy! }
32: 
33:       # Clean up orphan optimized images
34:       OptimizedImage
35:         .joins("LEFT JOIN uploads ON optimized_images.upload_id = uploads.id")
36:         .where("uploads.id IS NULL")
37:         .find_each { |optimized_image| optimized_image.destroy! }
38: 
39:       # Clean up optimized images that needs to be regenerated
40:       OptimizedImage
41:         .joins(:upload)
42:         .where("optimized_images.url NOT LIKE '%/optimized/_X/%'")
43:         .where("uploads.url LIKE '%/original/_X/%'")
44:         .limit(50)
45:         .find_each do |optimized_image|
46:           upload = optimized_image.upload
47:           optimized_image.destroy!
48:           upload.rebake_posts_on_old_scheme
49:         end
50:     end
51:   end
52: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: module Jobs
4:   class CleanUpUploads < ::Jobs::Scheduled
5:     every 1.hour
6: 
7:     def execute(args)
8:       grace_period = [SiteSetting.clean_orphan_uploads_grace_period_hours, 1].max
9: 
10:       # Always remove invalid upload records regardless of clean_up_uploads setting.
11:       Upload
12:         .by_users
13:         .where(
14:           "retain_hours IS NULL OR created_at < current_timestamp - interval '1 hour' * retain_hours",
15:         )
16:         .where("created_at < ?", grace_period.hour.ago)
17:         .where(url: "")
18:         .find_each(&:destroy!)
19: 
20:       return unless SiteSetting.clean_up_uploads?
21: 
22:       # Do nothing if the last cleanup was run too recently.
23:       last_cleanup_timestamp = last_cleanup
24:       if last_cleanup_timestamp.present? &&
25:            (Time.zone.now.to_i - last_cleanup_timestamp) < (grace_period / 2).hours
26:         return
27:       end
28: 
29:       result = Upload.by_users
30:       Upload.unused_callbacks&.each { |handler| result = handler.call(result) }
31: 
32:       # 1. Exclude uploads that have retain_hours set and are still within that retention period.
33:       # 2. Exclude uploads created in the grace period.
34:       # 3. Exclude secure uploads that have an access_control_post_id.
35:       # 4. Exclude uploads that are link to an upload reference.
36:       # 5. Exclude uploads that are linked to anything but a Post via UploadReference.
37:       result =
38:         result
39:           .where(
40:             "uploads.retain_hours IS NULL OR uploads.created_at < current_timestamp - interval '1 hour' * uploads.retain_hours",
41:           )
42:           .where("uploads.created_at < ?", grace_period.hour.ago)
43:           .where(
44:             "((uploads.access_control_post_id IS NULL) OR (uploads.access_control_post_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT uploads.secure))",
45:           )
46:           .joins("LEFT JOIN upload_references ON upload_references.upload_id = uploads.id")
47:           .where("upload_references.upload_id IS NULL")
48:           .with_no_non_post_relations
49: 
50:       result.find_each do |upload|
51:         next if Upload.in_use_callbacks&.any? { |callback| callback.call(upload) }
52:         upload.sha1.present? ? upload.destroy : upload.delete
53:       end
54: 
55:       ExternalUploadStub.cleanup!
56: 
57:       self.last_cleanup = Time.zone.now.to_i
58:     end
59: 
60:     def last_cleanup=(timestamp)
61:       Discourse.redis.setex(last_cleanup_key, 7.days.to_i, timestamp.to_s)
62:     end
63: 
64:     def last_cleanup
65:       timestamp = Discourse.redis.get(last_cleanup_key)
66:       timestamp ? timestamp.to_i : timestamp
67:     end
68: 
69:     def reset_last_cleanup!
70:       Discourse.redis.del(last_cleanup_key)
71:     end
72: 
73:     protected
74: 
75:     def last_cleanup_key
76:       "LAST_UPLOAD_CLEANUP"
77:     end
78:   end
79: end

(End of file - total 79 lines)
</content>

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: module Jobs
4:   # Sometimes we need to update the access control metadata for a _lot_ of objects on S3 (such as when secure uploads
5:   # is enabled), this is best spread out over many jobs instead of having to do the whole thing serially.
6:   class SyncAccessControlForUploads < ::Jobs::Base
7:     sidekiq_options queue: "low"
8: 
9:     def execute(args)
10:       return if !Discourse.store.external?
11:       return if !args.key?(:upload_ids)
12: 
13:       Upload
14:         .includes(:optimized_images)
15:         .where(id: args[:upload_ids])
16:         .find_in_batches do |uploads|
17:           uploads.each do |upload|
18:             begin
19:               Discourse.store.update_upload_access_control(upload, remove_existing_acl: true)
20:             rescue => err
21:               Discourse.warn_exception(
22:                 err,
23:                 message: "Failed to update upload access control",
24:                 env: {
25:                   upload_id: upload.id,
26:                   filename: upload.original_filename,
27:                 },
28:               )
29:             end
30:           end
31:         end
32:     end
33:   end
34: end

4:   class FixOutOfSyncUserUploadedAvatar < ::Jobs::Onceoff
5:     def execute_onceoff(args)
6:       DB.exec(<<~SQL)
7:       WITH X AS (
8:         SELECT
9:           u.id AS user_id,
10:           ua.gravatar_upload_id AS gravatar_upload_id
11:         FROM users u
12:         JOIN user_avatars ua ON ua.user_id = u.id
13:         LEFT JOIN uploads ON uploads.id = u.uploaded_avatar_id
14:         WHERE u.uploaded_avatar_id IS NOT NULL
15:         AND uploads.id IS NULL
16:       )
17:       UPDATE users
18:       SET uploaded_avatar_id = X.gravatar_upload_id
19:       FROM X
20:       WHERE users.id = X.user_id
21:       AND coalesce(uploaded_avatar_id,-1) <> coalesce(X.gravatar_upload_id,-1)
22:       SQL
23:     end
24:   end
25: end

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: ##
4: # There are certain conditions with secure uploads when the security of
5: # uploads will need to change depending on the context they reside in.
6: #
7: # For example on these conditions:
8: #  * Topic category change
9: #  * Topic switching between PM and public topic
10: #  * Post moving between topics
11: #
12: # We need to go through all of the posts in that topic that
13: # own uploads via access_control_post_id, then for those uploads determine
14: # if they still need to be secure or not. For example an upload could be
15: # secure if it is in a PM, and then when the topic gets converted to a public
16: # topic the upload no longer needs to remain secure as it is no longer in
17: # a secure context.
18: class TopicUploadSecurityManager
19:   def initialize(topic)
20:     @topic = topic
21:   end
22: 
23:   def run
24:     rebaked_posts = []
25:     Rails.logger.debug("Updating upload security in topic #{@topic.id}")
26:     posts_owning_uploads.each do |post|
27:       Post.transaction do
28:         Rails.logger.debug("Updating upload security in topic #{@topic.id} - post #{post.id}")
29:         post.topic = @topic
30: 
31:         secure_status_did_change =
32:           post.owned_uploads_via_access_control.any? do |upload|
33:             # We already have the post preloaded so we may as well
34:             # attach it here to avoid another load in UploadSecurity
35:             # (which is called via update_secure_status)
36:             upload.access_control_post = post
37:             upload.update_secure_status(source: "topic upload security")
38:           end
39: 
40:         if secure_status_did_change
41:           post.rebake!
42:           rebaked_posts << post
43:         end
44:         Rails.logger.debug(
45:           "Security updated & rebake complete in topic #{@topic.id} - post #{post.id}",
46:         )
47:       end
48:     end
49: 
50:     return rebaked_posts if !SiteSetting.secure_uploads
51: 
52:     # We only want to do this if secure uploads is enabled. If
53:     # the setting is turned on after a site has been running
54:     # already, we want to make sure that any post moves after
55:     # this are handled and upload secure statuses and ACLs
56:     # are updated appropriately, as well as setting the access control
57:     # post for secure uploads missing it.
58:     #
59:     # Examples (all after secure uploads is enabled):
60:     #
61:     #  -> a public topic is moved to a private category after
62:     #  -> a PM is converted to a public topic
63:     #  -> a public topic is converted to a PM
64:     #  -> a topic is moved from a private to a public category
65:     posts_with_unowned_uploads.each do |post|
66:       Post.transaction do
67:         Rails.logger.debug(
68:           "Setting upload access control posts in topic #{@topic.id} - post #{post.id}",
69:         )
70:         post.topic = @topic
71: 
72:         secure_status_did_change =
73:           post.uploads.any? do |upload|
74:             first_post_upload_appeared_in =
75:               upload.upload_references.where(target_type: "Post").first.target
76:             if first_post_upload_appeared_in == post
77:               upload.update(access_control_post: post)
78:               upload.update_secure_status(source: "topic upload security")
79:             else
80:               false
81:             end
82:           end
83: 
84:         if secure_status_did_change
85:           post.rebake!
86:           rebaked_posts << post
87:         end
88:         Rails.logger.debug(
89:           "Completed changing access control posts #{secure_status_did_change ? "and rebaking" : ""} in topic #{@topic.id} - post #{post.id}",
90:         )
91:       end
92:     end
93: 
94:     Rails.logger.debug("Completed updating upload security in topic #{@topic.id}!")
95:     rebaked_posts
96:   end
97: 
98:   private
99: 
100:   def posts_owning_uploads
101:     Post.where(topic_id: @topic.id, id: Upload.select(:access_control_post_id))
102:   end
103: 
104:   def posts_with_unowned_uploads
105:     Post.where(
106:       topic_id: @topic.id,
107:       id:
108:         UploadReference.where(
109:           target_type: "Post",
110:           upload: Upload.where(access_control_post_id: nil),
111:         ).select(:target_id),
112:     ).includes(:uploads)
113:   end
114: end

2:   display: flex;

10:

23:     }

33:       background-color: var(--tertiary-very-low);

48:         background-color: var(--tertiary-very-low);

56:

66:         background-position: center;
67:       }
68:     }
69:

93:       box-sizing: border-box;
94:

99:

116:     }
117:

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class DisableChatUploadsIfSecureMediaEnabled < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
4:   ##
5:   # At this point in time, secure media is not compatible with chat,
6:   # so if it is enabled then chat uploads must be disabled to avoid undesirable
7:   # behaviour.
8:   #
9:   # The env var DISCOURSE_ALLOW_UNSECURE_CHAT_UPLOADS can be set to keep
10:   # it enabled, but this is strongly advised against.
11:   def up
12:     chat_allow_uploads_value =
13:       DB.query_single("SELECT value FROM site_settings WHERE name = 'chat_allow_uploads'").first
14: 
15:     # nil means it is true, since the default value is true
16:     chat_uploads_enabled = chat_allow_uploads_value == "t" || chat_allow_uploads_value.nil?
17: 
18:     secure_media_enabled =
19:       DB.query_single("SELECT value FROM site_settings WHERE name = 'secure_media'").first == "t"
20:     secure_uploads_enabled =
21:       DB.query_single("SELECT value FROM site_settings WHERE name = 'secure_uploads'").first == "t"
22: 
23:     if (secure_media_enabled || secure_uploads_enabled) && chat_uploads_enabled &&
24:          !GlobalSetting.allow_unsecure_chat_uploads
25:       if chat_allow_uploads_value.nil?
26:         DB.exec(
27:           "
28:           INSERT INTO site_settings(name, data_type, value, created_at, updated_at)
29:           VALUES('chat_allow_uploads', 5, 'f', NOW(), NOW())
30:         ",
31:         )
32:       else
33:         DB.exec("UPDATE site_settings SET value = 'f' WHERE name = 'chat_allow_uploads'")
34:       end
35:     end
36:   end
37: 
38:   def down
39:     raise ActiveRecord::IrreversibleMigration
40:   end
41: end

20:     chat_auto_silence_from_flags_duration: "Кількість хвилин, на які користувача буде автоматично вимкнено через позначені його повідомлення в чаті."
21:     chat_duplicate_message_sensitivity: "Ймовірність того, що повторне повідомлення від того самого відправника буде заблоковано за короткий проміжок часу. Десяткове число від 0 до 1.0, де 1.0 є найвищим значенням (повідомлення блокуються частіше і за менший проміжок часу). Встановіть `0`, щоб дозволити дублікати повідомлень."
22:     chat_minimum_message_length: "Мінімальна кількість символів для повідомлення чату."
23:     chat_allow_uploads: "Дозволити завантаження в публічних чатах і каналах прямих повідомлень."
24:     chat_archive_destination_topic_status: "Статус, який має отримати тема призначення після завершення архівування каналу. Це стосується лише тих випадків, коли тема призначення є новою, а не існуючою темою."
25:     direct_message_enabled_groups: "Дозволити користувачам у цих групах створювати особисті чати між користувачами. Примітка: команда обслуговування завжди може створювати особисті чати, і користувачі зможуть відповідати на особисті чати, ініційовані користувачами, які мають дозвіл на їх створення."
26:     chat_message_flag_allowed_groups: "Користувачі цих груп можуть позначати повідомлення чату. Зверніть увагу, що адміністратори та модератори завжди можуть позначати повідомлення чату."
27:     chat_pinning_messages_allowed_groups: "Користувачам у цих групах дозволено закріплювати повідомлення чату в каналах, до яких вони мають доступ. Зверніть увагу, що адміністратори та модератори завжди можуть закріплювати повідомлення чату. Будь-який учасник групового чату або особистого повідомлення може закріплювати там повідомлення."
28:     max_mentions_per_chat_message: "Максимальна кількість сповіщень @name, які користувач може використовувати в повідомленні чату."
29:     chat_max_direct_message_users: "Під час створення нового прямого повідомлення користувачі не можуть додавати більше ніж цю кількість інших користувачів. Встановіть 0, щоб дозволити повідомлення лише собі. Персонал звільняється від цього параметра."
30:     chat_allow_archiving_channels: "Дозвольте співробітникам архівувати повідомлення в темі при закритті каналу."
31:     chat_editing_grace_period: "Протягом (n) секунд після надсилання чату редагування не відображатиме (відредагований) тег у повідомленні чату."
32:     chat_editing_grace_period_max_diff_low_trust: "Максимальна кількість змінених символів, дозволених у пільговому періоді редагування чату, а при більшій зміні показуватиметься тег (відредаговано) біля повідомлення чату (рівень довіри 0 і 1)."
33:     chat_editing_grace_period_max_diff_high_trust: "Максимальна кількість змін символів, дозволена протягом пільгового періоду редагування чату, якщо змінено більше, відображати тег (відредаговано) біля повідомлення чату (рівень довіри 2 і вище)."
34:     chat_preferred_index: "Бажана вкладка при завантаженні /chat."
35:     allow_chat_in_anonymous_mode: "Увімкніть це налаштування, щоб дозволити користувачам, які переглядають ваш сайт анонімно, користуватися чатом. Цей параметр вимагає, щоб було ввімкнено параметр `дозволити анонімний режим`."
36:     chat_search_enabled: "Увімкніть цей параметр, щоб дозволити користувачам шукати повідомлення чату."

40:       chat_upload_not_allowed_secure_uploads: "Завантаження чату не дозволяється, якщо ввімкнено налаштування безпечного завантаження."

20:     chat_auto_silence_from_flags_duration: "Liczba minut, przez które użytkownicy będą wyciszeni, gdy zostaną automatycznie wyciszeni z powodu oflagowanych wiadomości na czacie."
21:     chat_duplicate_message_sensitivity: "Prawdopodobieństwo, że zduplikowana wiadomość od tego samego nadawcy zostanie zablokowana w krótkim czasie. Liczba dziesiętna z zakresu od 0 do 1,0, gdzie 1,0 jest najwyższym ustawieniem (blokuje wiadomości częściej w krótszym czasie). Ustaw na „0”, aby zezwolić na duplikaty wiadomości."
22:     chat_minimum_message_length: "Minimalna liczba znaków wiadomości na czacie."
23:     chat_allow_uploads: "Zezwalaj na przesyłanie plików w publicznych kanałach czatu i kanałach wiadomości bezpośrednich."
24:     chat_archive_destination_topic_status: "Status, jaki powinien mieć temat docelowy po zakończeniu archiwizacji kanału. Dotyczy to tylko sytuacji, gdy temat docelowy jest nowym tematem, a nie istniejącym."
25:     direct_message_enabled_groups: "Zezwól użytkownikom w tych grupach na tworzenie prywatnych czatów między użytkownikami. Uwaga: personel zawsze może tworzyć prywatne czaty, a użytkownicy będą mogli odpowiadać na prywatne czaty inicjowane przez użytkowników, którzy mają uprawnienia do ich tworzenia."
26:     chat_message_flag_allowed_groups: "Użytkownicy w tych grupach mogą oznaczać flagami wiadomości czatu. Należy pamiętać, że administratorzy i moderatorzy zawsze mogą oznaczać flagami wiadomości czatu."
27:     chat_pinning_messages_allowed_groups: "Użytkownicy w tych grupach mogą przypinać wiadomości czatu w kanałach, do których mają dostęp. Pamiętaj, że administratorzy i moderatorzy zawsze mogą przypinać wiadomości czatu. Każdy członek czatu grupowego lub wiadomości prywatnej może przypinać tam wiadomości."
28:     max_mentions_per_chat_message: "Maksymalna liczba powiadomień @name, których użytkownik może użyć w wiadomości na czacie."
29:     chat_max_direct_message_users: "Użytkownicy nie mogą dodać więcej niż ta liczba innych użytkowników podczas tworzenia nowej wiadomości bezpośredniej. Ustaw na 0, aby zezwolić na wysyłanie wiadomości tylko do siebie. Personel jest zwolniony z tego ustawienia."
30:     chat_allow_archiving_channels: "Zezwól personelowi na archiwizowanie wiadomości w temacie podczas zamykania kanału."
31:     chat_editing_grace_period: "Przez (n) sekund po wysłaniu wiadomości jej edycja nie będzie pokazywać znacznika „edytowana”."
32:     chat_editing_grace_period_max_diff_low_trust: "Maksymalna liczba zmian znaków dozwolona w okresie karencji edycji czatu, jeśli zmieniono więcej, wyświetl znacznik (edytowany) w wiadomości czatu (poziom zaufania 0 i 1)."
33:     chat_editing_grace_period_max_diff_high_trust: "Maksymalna liczba zmian znaków dozwolona w okresie karencji edycji czatu, jeśli zmieniono więcej, wyświetl znacznik (edytowany) w wiadomości czatu (poziom zaufania 2 i wyższy)."
